rationale: Civil Engineer with only 1.2 years of experience at Stark Industries (fictional/honeypot company), with skills limited to Spring Boot, Figma, and CSS — zero ML, IR, or ranking experience.
9.2yr .NET/DevOps engineer whose entire career spans Mphasis and Cognizant (IT services) with self-learner-only AI exposure and no production ML, embeddings, or ranking system experience.

AI Research Engineer at product companies (Haptik, Rephrase.ai) with production recommendation/collaborative filtering and XGBoost experience, but lacks dense retrieval, vector databases, hybrid search, and ranking evaluation metrics (NDCG/MRR) that the role requires.

Sales Executive at Stark Industries (fictional/honeypot company) whose 9.9yr career spans sales, graphic design, and customer support — entirely non-technical with no engineering or ML work whatsoever.

8.4yr developer whose entire career is at Infosys and TCS (IT services only) across mobile, DevOps, and .NET roles with no production ML, retrieval, or ranking experience despite a Ph.D in Computer Science.
